{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Karoshan wands
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karoshan wands]] were trained on [[Raion]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Raion gave him an encouraging pat. "No!" Then he backed up, paying no attention to the Karoshan guns and wands that had been trained on him since he had laid a hand on her.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
